description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, set on a green lawn base. The structure features a light-colored exterior, likely painted wood or siding, with a prominent gable roof in a muted gray tone. Windows are distributed along the longer sides, with a small covered porch and steps at the front entrance. The rear of the bungalow includes a partially enclosed patio or sunroom with large windows, providing a view into the backyard. The overall design is simple and functional, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on horizontal lines typical of mid-century suburban homes.
description: A single-story, light-colored bungalow with a gable roof, front porch, and rear sunroom, set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Side view showing a row of windows and the long, uninterrupted wall of the bungalow.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the entry porch, steps, and a pair of windows flanking the door.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with more windows and the covered entry area visible.
description_view_3: Rear view featuring a partially enclosed sunroom or patio with large windows and a small extension.
